name: cht-number-picker
description: Mobile-friendly local wrapper for the Chunghwa Telecom mobile number search page.

scripts.check:js: node --check worker.js && node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js
scripts.check:cf: npm run check:js && npm run check:pages
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run prepare:pages && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name cht-number-picker --branch main --commit-dirty=true
